title: FFmpeg WebGPU Compat
subtitle: Hardware-accelerated video filtering
points: Integrated WebGPU hardware support into FFmpeg.
Implemented vf_scale_webgpu custom filter for high-performance scaling.
Resolved complex runtime errors regarding filter registration.

title: Interactive 3D Portfolio
subtitle: Immersive web experience
points: Built a highly interactive portfolio using React and Three.js.
Exported baked lighting from Blender for realistic rendering.
Implemented custom raycasting and object interactions.

title: AI Task Manager
subtitle: Smart scheduling and organization
points: Developed a full-stack task manager predicting task completion time.
Used natural language processing to categorize and prioritize tasks.
